# Vault Template

Starting point for a new teammate's market vault. Copy what you need into `Sapia-Sales-Vault/`.

## What to fill in
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `market.md` | Set your region and market context |
| `00-ICP/Target_Account_List.template.csv` | Add your target accounts, then rename to `Target_Account_List.csv` and run `research-analyst` to score/tier |
| `04-Brand_Voice/Sender_Voice_Profiles/Voice_Profile.template.md` | Write your own voice profile, rename to `<yourname>_Voice_Profile.md` |

## What you inherit unchanged (do not edit per market)
Pulled from the shared engine, not this template:
- `00-ICP/ICP_Scoring_Rubric.md`, `ICP_Master_Profile.md`, `Persona_Maps.md`
- `01-Product/` product knowledge
- `02-Case_Studies/` approved proof points

## Folders that fill up as you work (start empty)
- `05-Signals/` — newsletter engagers, job movers, trigger events logs
- `06-Performance/` — email performance + campaign learnings
- `03-Outreach/` — winning emails + sequence templates
